patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/442

## Problem
`pm contracts` is the machine-discovery entrypoint but costs ~25 KB default JSON (--availability-only is 24.7 KB and still expands every extension/package subcommand); --action create is 63.5 KB; --full is 520 KB. No minimal "command + one-line intent" surface exists; agents pay ~25 KB before their first real command.

## Proposed fix
`pm contracts --summary` emitting one `{ command, intent }` line per top-level command (collapse subcommands/aliases), targeting 1-3 KB; make --availability-only actually lean. Progressive disclosure: summary -> `--command <c> --flags-only` -> --full.

## Relationship
Feeds epic pm-n7rr acceptance (contracts payload measurably reduced). pm-a22j baselines the numbers; pm-e2bq applies the same tiering to help output. This item is the contracts-side tier.

## Definition of done
--summary mode sized 1-3 KB in this workspace; --availability-only no longer expands subcommands; sizes recorded before/after on pm-a22j; contracts spec + docs updated.
GH-442: lean pm contracts --summary mode for cheap agent bootstrap (25KB -> 1-3KB)

Dogfood GH-442: pm contracts costs ~25KB minimum (520KB --full) with no command+intent summary tier; add --summary for progressive disclosure. Duplicate check: pm-e2bq covers tiered HELP, pm-a22j covers measurement; no item covers the contracts-side tier.
contracts --summary emits one {command,intent} line per top-level command at 1-3KB; --availability-only stops expanding subcommands; before/after sizes recorded on pm-a22j; spec+docs updated
